Bongu Kichan Song Lyrics
Kadhalum Kadandhu Pogum
Singer(s): Santhosh Narayanan
Music: Santhosh Narayanan

Bongu kichan
vaangikkuraan
salpi segaru.
aakkaan perusaa
vanttaan solla
mooditu odiru.

kaadu
kaadu maela voodu
voodu maela theevu
theevu maela aalu.

aalu
aalu maela maalu
maalu maela aalu
anna vaaiyila apple-u

thaattu poottu
thavulu paattu.
aal aappeettu
kaala neettu
kaalu maattu
lastu naattu
waste mannaachi.

eguru neekkaandi
topi unakku.
couple-u holdsu
vittu pochchunaa
gandhi kanakku.

kaadu
kaadu maela voodu
voodu maela theevu
theevu maela aalu.

aalu
aalu maela maalu
maalu maela aalu
anna vaaiyila apple-u

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Bongu Kichan?

The song Bongu Kichan conveys a sense of joy and celebration, highlighting playful interactions and a carefree spirit.

What is the plot context of the movie Kadhalum Kadandhu Pogum?

The movie Kadhalum Kadandhu Pogum revolves around love and relationships, showcasing the ups and downs of romance.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung and composed by Santhosh Narayanan, known for his unique style and energetic compositions.

When was Bongu Kichan released?

The song was released on March 4, 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Bongu Kichan, the vibrant energy of Santhosh Narayanan's vocals shines through, making it a perfect anthem for celebrations. The song encapsulates the carefree spirit of youth, inviting listeners to let loose and enjoy life. Its upbeat tempo and playful lyrics evoke feelings of happiness and joy, making it a favorite at parties and gatherings. Overall, it serves as a reminder to embrace the fun moments in life.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Bongu Kichan from Kadhalum Kadandhu Pogum is a vibrant celebration of life and joy, brought to life by the dynamic vocals of Santhosh Narayanan. This energetic dance number perfectly captures the essence of youthful exuberance and fun. With its catchy beats and playful lyrics, it's a song that will get everyone on their feet!
